title: Thikki Thenarudhu Devathai Lyrics Vu Songs Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Thikki Thenarudhu Devathai  (Junior)
Singers: B.Shruti, ‘Super Singer Junior’ Aajeedh
Movie: Vu
Lyrics: Murugan Manthiram
Music: Abhijith Ramasamy		 .
Lyrics in Thanglish
Exact translation of tamil words
Thikki Thenarudhu Devathai
Vetka padudhu oru poomazha, thaanaa
sikki kidakura aambala, naanthaan

Arisi nellulayum, kuthum mullulayum
un mugam vandhu sirikum
andha nilaa thothu pogum
unna paartha indha vazhka pidikudhey

Kattu karumbula thaenthuli
enna mirattudhu un mozhi
neethaan putham pudhusaa pootha
poochedi pola
aala kollurayae, aayul ketkuraye

Nee varum neram kolambum
kedigaaram thanna marakkum
idhayam thudikka silayaa nikkudhey

Anakattu thanni pola nikkura
raathiri pooraam muzhichi kidakuren
Kottum siripula uranji kidakuren
kitta nadakayil kirangi thavikuren
aathaaadi usurellaam ozhugi thudikuren
uravaaga unna kadavul kitta kettu vaanguven

Thikki Thenarudhu Devathai
Vetka padudhu oru poomazha, thaanaa
sikki kidakura aambala, naanthaan

Kattu karumbula thaenthuli
enna mirattudhu un mozhi
neethaan putham pudhusaa pootha
poochedi pola
aala kollurayae, aayul ketkuraye English Translation

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

Thikki Thenarudhu Devathai expresses the beauty and joy of love, portraying romantic imagery through its lyrics.

What is the plot context of the movie Vu?

The movie Vu explores themes of love and relationships, making this song a perfect fit for its narrative.

Who are the singers and music director of the song?

The song features the talented voices of Aajeedh and B.Shruti, with music composed by Abhijith Ramasamy.

When was the song released?

Thikki Thenarudhu Devathai was released on July 7, 2013.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Thikki Thenarudhu Devathai, the song encapsulates the essence of love and affection, making it a standout piece in the movie Vu. The lyrics, penned by Murugan Manthiram, evoke a sense of joy and romance, perfectly complemented by the melodious voices of Aajeedh and B.Shruti. This duet not only enhances the film's narrative but also resonates with anyone who has experienced love. The soothing melody and heartfelt expressions make it an ideal choice for romantic occasions.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Thikki Thenarudhu Devathai from Vu is a delightful romantic melody that beautifully captures the essence of love. With the enchanting voices of Aajeedh and B.Shruti, this song is a perfect blend of heartfelt lyrics and soothing music. Experience the magic of this collaboration that resonates with every lover's heart.
stanzaMeanings: The goddess is coming, like a flower blooming, isn't it a sweet surprise, I am here.
In the rice fields and thorny bushes, your face smiles, the moon will come to greet you, seeing you makes life enjoyable.
In the sugarcane, the sweet dew is dripping, your words are fresh and new, like a flower blooming, it brings life.
When you come, my heart forgets its worries, it beats softly, waiting for you.
Like water in a pot, I am resting at night, I am lost in laughter, I am wandering in the streets, I am giving up everything, I will take you to God.
The goddess is coming, like a flower blooming, isn't it a sweet surprise, I am here.
In the sugarcane, the sweet dew is dripping, your words are fresh and new, like a flower blooming, it brings life.
